title: EC L_Ender's Cataclysm Plugin
description: A plugin Mod for Expanded Combat adding compatibility with L_Ender's Cataclysm Compat
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ec-l-enders-cataclysm-compat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![L_Ender's Cataclysm Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cf9a8785d4e073542b20458847cc819116fffcd_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l_ender-s-cataclysm)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Cataclysm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/l_ender-s-cataclysm). ### adds support for: Ignitium - Shield, Quiver, and Gauntlets \ Cursium - Shield, Quiver, and Gauntlets \ Witherite - Gauntlets and Quiver \ Amethyst Crab Shell - Gauntlets \ Black steel - Shield, and Weapons \ \ Click the banner to get the discount:
